overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring the sunlit Mediterranean-style city of Beauclair. The character walks along cobblestone paths, ascends grand stone staircases, and explores a scenic gazebo overlook with historic architecture and lush vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beside historic stone building with artist easel

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone building wall past an artist's easel set up near the entrance

entered.detail: tall cream-colored stone wall with decorative carved patterns and arched doorway
wooden artist easel displaying a colorful painting of red flowers
wide stone staircase ascending to upper level with ornate railings
series of stone arches forming a balcony railing overlooking water

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along the exterior wall of a historic stone building. An artist's easel stands to the right displaying a painting, while ahead lies a grand staircase leading upward. The camera follows Geralt as he walks along the shaded walkway toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand outdoor stone staircase with flanking railings

events.description: begins ascending the wide stone staircase toward the upper terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone stairs with two swords visible on his back

notable_agents.action: seated figure resting on a wooden chair near the base of the stairs

entered.detail: mature leafy trees providing shade along the staircase
elaborate historic architecture with balconies and spires visible above

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends the grand stone staircase flanked by ornate railings. Olive trees line the left side while the historic city architecture rises above. A seated NPC rests near the stairs as the camera climbs steadily upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined cobblestone promenade with flower beds and statues

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace path passing pedestrians and approaching the gazebo overlook

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green and yellow clothing walking ahead on the path
pedestrian in blue and yellow outfit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: sunlit cobblestone pathway winding along the terrace edge
lush bushes with bright pink and red flowers in stone planters
classical stone statues of figures on pedestals among the trees
elaborate stone gazebo with columns and pointed arches at the overlook

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a wide cobblestone promenade lined with olive trees and vibrant flower beds. Other pedestrians stroll along the path as Geralt approaches an ornate stone gazebo overlooking the distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate stone gazebo with angel statues overlooking mountain valley

events.description: enters the covered gazebo structure with stone columns
pauses and turns to admire the scenic mountain and lake view

agents.ego_description: walking around inside the gazebo and looking out at the panoramic valley view

entered.detail: tall ornate stone columns supporting the gazebo roof
stone statues of winged angels positioned on pillars around the gazebo perimeter
panoramic view of blue lake and distant mountains under bright sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the ornate stone gazebo, passing between tall columns and angel statues. The camera circles the interior, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the blue lake and distant mountains beyond the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: statue-lined terrace with overlook to lower city and harbor

events.description: exits the gazebo back onto the open terrace path
stops at the stone railing to overlook the lower city and harbor

agents.ego_description: walking past heroic statues and children playing, then stopping at the overlook to view the city below

notable_agents.action: children sitting and playing on the cobblestone ground
guard in armor standing at the overlook railing looking at the view

entered.detail: large classical statues of heroic figures on high pedestals lining the path
view of the lower city rooftops, harbor, and distant spires
decorative stone balustrade with arched openings overlooking the valley

segments.scene_description: Exiting the gazebo, Geralt walks along a path lined with heroic statues. Children play on the ground nearby. He stops at a stone overlook railing next to a guard, gazing down at the lower city and harbor visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded city walkway, ascending through historic architecture to reach a panoramic mountain overlook. It begins along the exterior wall of a stone building past an artist's easel, following Geralt as he moves toward a grand staircase. As he climbs the stairs flanked by olive trees and ornate railings, the perspective rises steadily above the city streets before opening onto a wide cobblestone promenade filled with flower beds and strolling pedestrians. The camera then glides into an ornate stone gazebo between columns and angel statues, circling to reveal a breathtaking view of a blue lake and distant mountains. Finally, the movement continues past heroic statues and playing children toward a stone railing, where the view shifts to look down upon the lower city and harbor.
